title: Use LLM prompt-construction indirection for page-image generation prompts
notes: Suggestion #7 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-04). Improve page-image quality by introducing AI indirection: pass style/page/context elements to a text model that composes the image-generation prompt, then send that prompt to the image model. Current direct Python prompt assembly appears to reduce text-image coherence and often yields unwanted text in images. Persist generated prompts in the same editable store currently used so users can review and manually refine prompts before image generation.
